name: Meeting Archive
description: Public archive of government meetings with searchable records, calendar browsing, and per-meeting timelines of votes and agenda items. Provides citizens long-term access to council and committee proceedings.

page_briefs.meetings: Meeting archive page offers dual navigation: a filter bar at top with body (council, committee, board), date range, and keyword search, followed by a month-view calendar dotted with meeting markers, and beneath that a sortable data table listing meetings with columns for date, body, location, agenda item count, and links to minutes and video recordings.
page_briefs.meeting-detail: Meeting detail page opens with a detail header showing meeting title, body, date, location, attendees, and links to agenda PDF and video recording. A timeline component displays each agenda item in sequence with timestamps linking into the video. A voting-breakdown bars visualization shows how each member voted on every motion with passing and failing motions clearly indicated.

shells.sidebar-main: Left sidebar with meeting body navigation and main content area
